# Implementation Plan: Multi-Organization (Multi-Tenancy) Support

**Branch**: `002-multi-org-tenancy` | **Date**: 2026-04-11 | **Spec**: [spec.md](./spec.md)  
**Input**: Feature specification from `/specs/002-multi-org-tenancy/spec.md`

**Note**: Generated by `/speckit.plan`. Execution workflow reference: `.specify/templates/plan-template.md`.

## Summary

Introduce **organization-scoped multi-tenancy**: new **`organizations`** and **`organization_members`** tables; add **`organization_id`** to all core business tables; enforce isolation with **RLS** scoped by membership (not client-only); provide **active organization context** in the React app (`useOrganization`) and an **org switcher** in the sidebar when the user has multiple memberships; **admin** vs **member** behavior per spec; backfill existing data to a default org **Churchill**; new orgs remain operator-provisioned with empty business data.

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: TypeScript 5.x, React 18  
**Primary Dependencies**: Vite, React Router v6, TanStack React Query, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Supabase JS client  
**Storage**: PostgreSQL (Supabase), RLS-enabled tables  
**Testing**: `npm test`, `npm run lint` (project standard); integration tests as added for RLS  
**Target Platform**: Web (desktop-first PWA-friendly)  
**Project Type**: Single-page web app + Supabase Edge Functions (Deno)  
**Performance Goals**: No regressions to perceived load times; org switch should refetch lists within one interaction (spec SC-003)  
**Constraints**: Tenant isolation is authoritative at the database; service-role code must re-verify membership; additive migrations preferred  
**Scale/Scope**: Full schema audit + RLS rewrite + app-wide query/context updates + Edge Function audit

## Constitution Check

*GATE: Passed for planning. Re-check after implementation.*

| Principle | Status |
|-----------|--------|
| **Dual router** | Org switcher and providers live under `src/app/` (shell) / shared layout; **no removal** of `src/pages/` without migration. Sidebar (`src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx` or successor) augmented—preserve route structure. |
| **Module boundaries** | New **`src/modules/organizations/`** (or `settings` submodule) for org UI; **`src/shared/`** for `OrganizationProvider`, `useOrganization`, and shared types. Existing modules gain org filters via hooks—**no deep imports** across features. |
| **Supabase + RLS** | New/changed policies use **`(select auth.uid())`**; tenant check via **`organization_members`** + **`organization_id`** on rows. |
| **Secrets** | No new secrets on client; Edge Functions continue server-only keys in `supabase/functions/_shared/`. |
| **Additive-first** | Nullable `organization_id` → backfill → NOT NULL; avoid destructive drops. |

**Post-design**: No constitution violations requiring the Complexity Tracking table.

## Project Structure

### Documentation (this feature)

```text
specs/002-multi-org-tenancy/
├── plan.md              # This file
├── research.md          # Phase 0
├── data-model.md        # Phase 1
├── quickstart.md        # Phase 1
├── contracts/           # Phase 1
│   ├── organization-context.md
│   └── edge-function-tenant.md
└── tasks.md             # From /speckit.tasks (not created here)
```

### Source Code (repository root)

```text
src/
├── app/
│   ├── providers.tsx           # Wire OrganizationProvider (or App-level)
│   ├── layout/                 # PageShell / Sidebar integration
│   └── router.tsx
├── pages/
│   └── NotFound.tsx
├── modules/
│   ├── organizations/          # NEW: org switcher UI, admin surfaces (minimal public API via index.ts)
│   ├── inbox/, orders/, payments/, ...  # EXISTING: add org-scoped queries + types
│   └── ...
├── shared/
│   ├── lib/supabase.ts         # May expose helpers; org id from context for filters
│   └── ...                     # OrganizationProvider, useOrganization
└── ...

supabase/
├── migrations/                 # organizations, organization_members, org_id columns, RLS
└── functions/
    ├── _shared/                # Tenant resolution helpers for service role
    └── */index.ts              # Per-function audit for org checks
```

**Structure Decision**: Single Vite app + Supabase backend. New code primarily in **`src/shared`** (context) and **`src/modules/organizations`** (feature UI), with incremental edits across existing modules for `.eq('organization_id', …)` and React Query keys.

## Complexity Tracking

> No constitution violations requiring justification. Tenant model is large but required by spec; phased migrations mitigate risk.
